title: Testing Object Collaborations and Contracts · Stakeholder Software Mission
summary: A community center scheduling team. Staff need conflict-safe bookings with replaceable repositories, notifications, and auditable state transitions. Planned artifact: Deliver Tested Resource Booking Engine with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Model allowed states and transitions explicitly so every method preserves domain invariants.
Group state changes into atomic application operations with clear success, rollback, and idempotency behavior.
Use strategy objects or callables when an algorithm varies independently and must be selected or tested explicitly.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
